title: consolidate stale markdown across docs/ and root
description:
## Summary

Audit of every `.md` file in `docs/` and the repo root for purpose + staleness. Two files were entirely dead and have been deleted; four were actively wrong on infrastructure facts and have been refreshed against the current cluster reality.

## What changed

**Deleted (dead/superseded):**
- `TOOLS.md` — claimed a unified 12-node cluster (reverted on 2026-05-09, PRs #621/#622), said the CNI partition was unfixable (fixed by the `wg-mesh` rollout), and gave wrong korczewski IPs. All accurate content lives in CLAUDE.md.
- `docs/autonomous-browser-agent-framework.md` — referenced `gpu-worker:*` tasks and a `docker-compose.gpu-worker.yaml` that no longer exist. Superseded by `k3d/llm-gpu.yaml` + `prod/llm-router.yaml`.

**Refreshed:**
- `README.md` — dropped retired Stripe/monitoring tasks, replaced unified-cluster wording with the two-cluster reality, points readers at CLAUDE.md as the canonical reference, fixed test-ID range (FA-01..29).
- `CONTRIBUTING.md` — aligned with the `dev-flow-plan` / `dev-flow-execute` workflow, corrected CI claims (only `task test:all` + inventory/secret scans run; `yamllint`/`shellcheck`/`kubeconform` are local-only), removed retired billing/stripe/monitoring tasks.
- `PENTEST_OVERVIEW.md` — corrected security-critical infra facts: split clusters with separate shared-db/Keycloak/cert-manager, dropped the Stripe publishable-key tier-1 vector, replaced the retired operator dashboard with the `/admin/*` website session, added the Arena multiplayer endpoint, generalised the non-HTTP port table to pin-nodes instead of stale IPs, fixed Kali scope/nmap targets.
- `GEMINI.md` — defers to CLAUDE.md as source of truth, corrected CI claims, added LiveKit/Arena/dev-stack to the service list.

**Kept as-is:**
- `CLAUDE.md` (authoritative reference)
- `AGENTS.md` (already a symlink to CLAUDE.md)
- `SOUL.md`, `IDENTITY.md`, `HEARTBEAT.md`, `USER.md` (orphaned but harmless persona docs)
- `docs/dev-stack/README.md`, `docs/db-schema-diagram.md`, drift reports, korczewski design brief, all archived plans/specs

## Diff size

6 files changed, **+217 / −681** lines.

## Test plan

- [x] `git grep` confirms no remaining references to deleted files except a historical tracking JSON (PR description for the whisper removal PR, which already noted the autonomous-browser-agent doc as cosmetic follow-up).
- [x] `task --dry` parses all 6 sentinel tasks (`workspace:deploy`, `:status`, `:teardown`, `:validate`, `:post-setup`, `config:show`).
- [x] No code/manifest changes — purely documentation. No deploy needed.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
